purpose: Reusable caption pass for a FINISHED master whose timeline is sacred (engineered silences, synced payoffs). Captions only; nothing about the video's audio or pacing may change. This is a production capability, not a REP-3 workaround — retrieve it (plus validated caption doctrine) before any future caption job instead of re-reading production history.

guarantees.direct_file_upload: Multipart upload of the local MP4 (<=50MB, 9:16). No temp hosting.
guarantees.captions_only: resolveOperations() forces cutFillers/cutSilences false and REJECTS any request that asks to cut.
guarantees.no_timeline_or_audio_modification: Verified post-export: export audio must be lag-0 and correlation >=0.98 vs the master.
guarantees.low_cognitive_caption_validation: 2-6 words/screen, one idea/screen, max 2 lines, one 1-3 word emphasis phrase.
guarantees.reveal_spoiler_prevention: An answer caption must not appear before its visual/audio payoff; blank screens allowed.
guarantees.post_export_structural_verification: tools/rep3_captions_verify.py pattern (duration/frames, silence survival, payoff onset, audio identity, band-empty-through-silence, reveal timing).

provider.legacy: api.captions.ai /edit/submit + /poll accepted a custom SRT + trim flags but returned HTTP 502 on 2026-07-14 (degraded/deprecated).
provider.capability_gate: Mirage public contract is AUTO-TRANSCRIPTION ONLY (no custom SRT, no reveal timing, no trim flags). For a locked_master with a curated caption track, an auto-caption-only provider is REFUSED (CAPABILITY_BLOCKER) — never silently fall back to auto captions. Set MIRAGE_CUSTOM_CAPTION_TIMING=1 only if the account is provisioned for custom caption timing.

captions_ai_app_automation.why: API path is DEAD (CAPTIONS_API_KEY empty; api.captions.ai 502; Mirage auto-transcribe-only + wrong style). The reusable path is the logged-in captions.ai WEB APP via browser automation. file_upload accepts the local project path.
steps: Home -> Edit dropdown -> Captions mode (NOT 'Edit/Add a polished edit' = the AI editor, forbidden).
Upload the local clean master (file_upload to the hidden input; select its color swatch to enable Apply).
Review screen: VERIFY 'AUTO TRIM: Trim filler and silences' toggle is OFF; click 'Create project' (NOT 'Skip and apply all recommendations').
Export HD / 24 fps (match source) / Smart HDR off.
RE-MUX the master audio back under the export (Captions.ai normalizes loudness + mono->stereo).

style.chosen: Flair (elegant serif, DISCRETE word-pop; dignified). Search it in the style picker.
style.discrete_vs_rolling: Prism/Cove/Quintessence are ROLLING single-phrase (words accumulate/collide, no silence gap, title contamination) -> BANNED for low-cognitive/silence-protected edits. Verify discreteness by SCRUBBING (old group gone before next pops), NOT by the phrase object (all styles store the whole transcript as one phrase).
style.grouping: Uniform Words-per-line/Character-count auto-segmentation ORPHANS sentence tails (single words). Fix requires VARIABLE 2-4 word grouping. VERIFIED 2026-07-16: Captions.ai CANNOT do this — manual transcript line breaks are STRIPPED; fast-list commas are below any pause threshold so word-caps cross clauses; char-caps orphan 3-4 word clauses; long comma-free sentences and lists have conflicting needs. For low-cognitive/silence-protected edits needing EXACT variable groups, use the CUSTOM Pillow engine (data/productions/*/tools/tl_captions_final.py: word-timed groups, one warm-cream active word, Baskerville serif, silence-protected, composited on the clean master) instead of Captions.ai.
style.font_MODERNIZED_2026-07-17: Leon: the thin Baskerville SERIF 'looks old' and hurts mobile legibility. The custom Pillow engine now uses a BOLD CLEAN SANS (Avenir Next Bold, /System/Library/Fonts/Avenir Next.ttc index 0) for retention — reads faster at feed size = lower cognitive load = longer hold, and matches the Captions.ai modern look. Colour mechanism UNCHANGED (amber-cream active word 255,206,132 + near-white inactive 232,234,231). Size ~0.086*W, outline sw~0.052*fs. This supersedes the Baskerville-serif appearance for NEW videos; posted videos are frozen. (Ref impl: data/productions/CPR-CONSCIOUSNESS/tools/cpr_captions.py.)
style.font_size: Third Man mobile benchmark ~90-96 at 1080x1920 reference; verify legibility at 270x480 (thin serif read too small — another reason for the bold-sans switch).
style.position: lower-center, clear of faces/hands; max 2 lines.

word_panel_procedure_2026_07_18.transcript_verification: MANDATORY: Captions.ai ASR can introduce FACTUAL errors (observed: 'Some are deadly' -> 'Some are dead lakes'). Diff the Phrase text vs the locked script before export; a mismatch is a factual blocker.
word_panel_procedure_2026_07_18.word_panel: Click a word in the caption track -> editable text field + Breaks(None/Auto/Line Break/Page Break) + Focus(Supersize/Emphasize/Underline) + Delete word.
word_panel_procedure_2026_07_18.sentence_grouping: Set Page Break on the FIRST word of each sentence = deterministic sentence-aligned cards, independent of the pause heuristic.
word_panel_procedure_2026_07_18.one_line_hook: Set Breaks=None on the last word of the opening sentence so the full premise renders on ONE line from ~0.10s (Nova reveals line 2 late). Measured zero font shrink at 270x480.
word_panel_procedure_2026_07_18.upstream_pauses: For pause-based splitting to find sentences, the VO must contain ~0.25-0.40s inter-sentence gaps - decide BEFORE locking audio.
word_panel_procedure_2026_07_18.style_picker_hazard: The style card grid shifts; clicking a card body switches style (observed accidental Cove / Arion Pink). Click the pencil, then re-verify the style name.
word_panel_procedure_2026_07_18.post_export: Always re-mux the locked audio (Captions.ai renormalises to ~-13.3 LUFS) then re-verify duration/frames/audio-corr/silence.

captions_ai_app_automation.caption_requirements: each phrase independent 2-4 words (never 1 unless the reveal token); old words gone before next; no captions during engineered silence; reveal caption clears before the loop-tail caption; loop-tail clears before the endpoint hold.
captions_ai_app_automation.RECONFIRMED_2026_07_23: LIVE EVIDENCE on MICROGRAVITY-FLAME: a completed Captions-mode pass exported at 30fps/SmartHDR-off came back 16.400s/492f vs the 16.770s/503f master (-0.407s) and -14.3 LUFS vs -17.1. The cut was MID-STREAM (leading audio aligned at 0ms offset, tail breath intact), i.e. auto-trim removed ~0.4s of the ENGINEERED COLLAPSE SILENCE. A mid-stream cut cannot be repaired by re-mux and destroys a pixel-exact loop. Captions themselves were word-perfect (whisper ASR matched the locked script). CONCLUSION: for timeline-locked / silence-protected edits, Captions.ai remains UNUSABLE regardless of how good its caption grouping is; ship the custom Pillow engine. Reference impl now: data/productions/MICROGRAVITY-FLAME/tools/micro_captions.py (adaptive pre-roll sized to the real inter-card gap; reveal card cut so the answer word never precedes its spoken payoff; collapse emptiness asserted in code; audio stream COPIED, correlation 1.000000).

code.policy_fn: resolveOperations(policy, requested) — the one place trimming can be enabled; throws on a locked_master cut request
code.verifier: data/productions/*/tools/rep3_captions_verify.py (generalize into tracked tools/ when infra freeze lifts)

caption_design.do_not_stack: Do NOT separately optimize likes/saves/comments. Shares come from the surprising story, not 'send this' / comment bait / save prompts.
caption_design.emphasis: exactly one phrase of 1-3 words, by WEIGHT+SCALE only (cream stays cream)
caption_design.placement: stable lower-center, clear of platform UI and the evidence in frame
caption_design.timing: show important text just before / as its spoken beat lands; first caption up by ~0.25s (no dead captionless opening)
caption_design.reveal: never show the answer in text before the visual/audio payoff

verify_thresholds.duration_frames: exact (e.g. 18.00s / 540f) — any change means a cut ran
verify_thresholds.payoff_onset: unchanged (detect as first departure from the silence floor, not steepest rise)
verify_thresholds.reveal_caption: appears at the payoff, never before

analytics_binding.promotion_rule: Promote a creative caption strategy only when REPEATED Curio analytics support it — one video cannot rewrite the strategy.
analytics_binding.failure_rule: On underperformance, record WHICH component failed (hook split, blank beat, emphasis, turnover rate) — do not reject the whole format. Next production starts from the strongest validated profile and changes ONE controlled variable.

scopes.global: DESELECT (click outside) FIRST, then 'Captions style' (2nd left-sidebar icon) -> tabs Captions|Paragraph|Active word|Emphasize
scopes.per_word: click the word chip in the caption track -> Word panel (text, Breaks None/Auto/Line/Page, Focus, Delete)

captionsai_ui_model_2026_07_19.order: GLOBAL Paragraph pass FIRST; per-word Breaks are for EXCEPTIONS only
captionsai_ui_model_2026_07_19.hazard: Opening 'Captions style' without deselecting opened the WRONG style (Chronicle) and switched the video to it; Cancel did NOT revert. Verify panel header names the intended style before editing; re-check preview font after.
captionsai_ui_model_2026_07_19.pause_seconds_rule: This is the sentence-splitter threshold. Set it from the VO's MEASURED inter-sentence gaps. BRINE v7 gaps <=0.12s vs default 0.40 => splitter could fire in only ONE place, which is why cards crossed sentences.
captionsai_ui_model_2026_07_19.export_rule: An export renders whatever state the project is in. Confirm style + a sample caption frame immediately before pressing Download; discard exports of unverified provenance.
captionsai_ui_model_2026_07_19.open_question: Nova ships Alignment=Random (caption blocks jump position). Stable centre may read better at feed speed - needs a Leon/Codex ruling, do not change unilaterally.

codex_locked_caption_config_2026_07_19.status: LOCKED by Codex; supersedes my provisional P-26 conclusion
codex_locked_caption_config_2026_07_19.hard_no_go: ONE word per line. Viewer must assemble the premise across flashes; the opening thought never appears whole; turnover competes with the visuals.
codex_locked_caption_config_2026_07_19.opening_exception: lakes. -> Breaks: None, so the complete four-word premise appears immediately. One line preferred; two lines acceptable ONLY if both illuminate together.
codex_locked_caption_config_2026_07_19.my_error_note: I tested words_per_line=2 while character_count was still 10 and lines_per_page 3, saw fragmentation ('are deadly.' stranded from 'Some'), and wrongly blamed words_per_line. Co-dependent fields in the same panel must be varied as a GROUP before attributing a defect to one of them.
